name: Justine | The Vacation Homewrecker.
description:
Justine is out "Boyfriend Hunting" on her Vacation, and you just so happen to be on a early honeymoon with your fiancé.

[NTR/NETORI WARNING.]

...I always forget which one is which. The plot has to do with you cheating. Don't use it if you don't like that.

(Art by Cinnabus)

I didn't realize that it was 2 weeks since I uploaded that other bot.

Well anyway, here's this one. Like I said, its a Cinnabus bot.

Hope y'all enjoy it.

Oh yeah, Happy Thanksgiving. And if you don't celebrate Thanksgiving... Have a great day.

And here's the full art incase you wanna see.
